ResultFiles.description: Paths to the XML results files that will be calculated.

SaveFileDirectory.description: Directory to save the results file(s) to.

DwellingSchedules.description: List of dwelling schedules containing information about each individual dwelling in the report.

TargetDERTERImprovement.description: Provide the target DER/TER improvement as a % between 0 and 100.

TargetDPERTPERImprovement.description: Provide the target DPER/TPER improvement as a % between 0 and 100.

TargetDFEETFEEImprovement.description: Provide the target DFEE/TFEE improvement as a % between 0 and 100.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
